title: Not Just Pattern
story: [Meridian-7 Log #022] rEx sent a set of access credentials, but their strength needs verification. Only passwords meeting the requirements can activate the encrypted communication channel: at least 8 characters, containing uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and digits. rEx says: "Security is the prerequisite for trust."
promptChallenge: [Target] Strong passwords: at least 8 characters, mixing uppercase, lowercase, and digits.
hints: [Hint] The password must satisfy three conditions simultaneously
[Hint] Lookahead assertions can check multiple conditions at the same position
[Hint] (?=.*[A-Z]) ensures at least one uppercase letter
promptHints: List all conditions the password must satisfy
Tell the AI to use multiple lookahead assertions to check conditions in parallel

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Password validation passed. Multiple assertions checking in parallel — you understood.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Validation failed. All three conditions must be met simultaneously.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Perfect validation. Precise orchestration of multiple lookaheads.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual validation. You've transcended simple pattern matching.
